description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages, test and package, using the default image continuumio/miniconda:4.5.4 for the test job and docker:stable with a docker:dind service for the package job, and set DOCKER_DRIVER and DOCKER_HOST variables for Docker. In the test stage add a test job that runs conda install -c bioconda -y -q python-omero, then pip install -r requirements-test.txt, then flake8, then pytest. In the package stage add a docker job that logs in to the GitLab Container Registry with docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY, builds the image with docker build -t $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME . and pushes it with docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME .
